Name: LockCamParam
Description: Determines the parameters relating to lock-on camera configurations, and the default camera.

Fields.Name: Camera: Target Distance
Fields.Description: The distance the camera is placed from the current target. In metres.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Minimum X-Axis Value
Fields.Description: The minimum rotational value on the X-axis for the camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Shift Ratio
Fields.Description: The standard value of rotation * rotation shift rate. 0.0 is the centre of screen, 1.0 is the top, -1.0 is the bottom.

Fields.Name: Character: Height Offset (Ground)
Fields.Description: The height of the camera's look point (from the character's root position, when touching the ground). In metres.

Fields.Name: Character: Max Lock Radius
Fields.Description: The maximum radius from the character's root position that the camera can be locked-on to.

Fields.Name: Camera: Vertical Field of View
Fields.Description: The vertical field of view to apply when active to the camera.

Fields.Name: Character: Horizontal Tracking %
Fields.Description: The character tracking rate for left and right motion, applied to the camera.

Fields.Name: Character: Vertical Tracking %
Fields.Description: The character tracking rate for up and down motion, applied to the camera.

Fields.Name: Character: Forward Tracking %
Fields.Description: The character tracking rate for forward motion, applied to the camera.

Fields.Name: Character: Backward Tracking %
Fields.Description: The character tracking rate for backward motion, applied to the camera.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Interpolation for Shift Ratio
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for the 'Rotation: Shift Ratio' field, independant of distance.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Angle
Fields.Description: If not 0, then an over-the-shoulder perspective is applied. If positive, the character is to the left, if negative, to the right.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for the lock-camera parameters.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Turning Method
Fields.Description: The turning method applied for the over-the-shoulder perspective.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Turning Speed
Fields.Description: The turning speed for the over-the-shoulder perspective, if the method is 'Press and Hold (Angle)'

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Turning Time Threshold
Fields.Description: The turning time threshold for the over-the-shoulder perspective, if the method is 'Press and Hold (Time)'

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Turning Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The turning interpolation rate for the over-the-shoulder perspective.

Fields.Name: Character: Horizontal Tracking Acceleration
Fields.Description: The maximum acceleration rate when tracking a character on the horizontal (X-axis) plane. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Character: Horizontal Tracking Deceleration
Fields.Description: The maximum deceleration if tracking a character on the horizontal (X-axis) plane, after having reached acceleration maximum. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Character: Horizontal Tracking Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for tracking a character on the horizontal (X-axis) plane.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Turning Time Threshold (Play Short)
Fields.Description: The turning time threshold for the over-the-shoulder perspective, if the method is 'Play Short'. Do not set below 1 frame.

Fields.Name: Character: Vertical Tracking Acceleration
Fields.Description: The maximum acceleration rate when tracking a character on the vertical (Y-axis) plane. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Character: Vertical Tracking Deceleration
Fields.Description: The maximum deceleration if tracking a character on the vertical (Y-axis) plane, after having reached acceleration maximum. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Character: Vertical Tracking Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for tracking a character on the vertical (Y-axis) plane.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Minimum Rotation Input Threshold (Play Short)
Fields.Description: The minimum rotation input threshold for the over-the-shoulder perspective, if the method is 'Play Short'. In radians.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation Tracking %
Fields.Description: The tracking rate when the camera is locked-on to another character.

Fields.Name: Rotation Speed: Minimum (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: The minimum rotation speed on the X-axis. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotation Speed: Maximum (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation speed on the X-axis. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotation High Speed: Minimum (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: The minimum rotation speed on the X-axis in the high-speed state. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotation High Speed: Maximum (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation speed on the X-axis in the high-speed state. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Priority
Fields.Description: The priority at which this parameter is applied. If the priority is the same as another, the ordering is handled internally.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Reverse Direction of Rotation
Fields.Description: If ON, when the character is on the left-hand side of the screen, and turns to the right, the over-the-shoulder perspective will switch, and vice versa.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Apply when Locked
Fields.Description: If ON, then the over-the-shoulder perspective will apply whilst locked-on.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Apply when Unlocked
Fields.Description: If ON, then the over-the-shoulder perspective will apply whilst not locked-on.

Fields.Name: Ignore Optional Rotation Speed %
Fields.Description: If ON, optional rotation speed rate is ignored (if ignored, the value used is 5).

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Reticule Movement %
Fields.Description: The factor to use with the movement speed value for the lock reticule when moving.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Maximum X-Axis Value
Fields.Description: The maximum rotational value on the X-axis for the camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Minimum Y-Axis Value
Fields.Description: The minimum rotational value on the Y-axis for the camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Rotation: Maximum Y-Axis Value
Fields.Description: The maximum rotational value on the Y-axis for the camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Character: Down Tracking %
Fields.Description: The character tracking rate for down motion, applied to the camera.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Minimum Shift Ratio
Fields.Description: The minimum value of rotation * rotation shift rate. 0.0 is the centre of screen, 1.0 is the top, -1.0 is the bottom.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Maximum Shift Ratio
Fields.Description: The maximum value of rotation * rotation shift rate. 0.0 is the centre of screen, 1.0 is the top, -1.0 is the bottom.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Shift Ratio - Interpolation Minimum Distance
Fields.Description: The minimum distance for the interpolation of the rotation * rotation shift rate.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Shift Ratio - Interpolation Middle-Minimum Distance
Fields.Description: The middle-minimum distance for the interpolation of the rotation * rotation shift rate.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Shift Ratio - Interpolation Middle-Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: The middle-maximum distance for the interpolation of the rotation * rotation shift rate.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Shift Ratio - Interpolation Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance for the interpolation of the rotation * rotation shift rate.

Fields.Name: Character: Maximum Horizontal Tracking Reduction from Speed
Fields.Description: The maximum amount of horizontal tracking reduction due to the speed of the character.

Fields.Name: Character: Minimum Horizontal Tracking Speed
Fields.Description: The horizontal speed at which the horizontal tracking rate is the lowest. In metres per second.

Fields.Name: Character: Maximum Horizontal Tracking Reduction from Speed (Front)
Fields.Description: The maximum amount of horizontal (front) tracking reduction due to the speed of the character.

Fields.Name: Character: Maximum Horizontal Tracking Reduction from Speed (Back)
Fields.Description: The maximum amount of horizontal (Back) tracking reduction due to the speed of the character.

Fields.Name: Camera: Minimum Lock-on Distance
Fields.Description: The minimum distance away from a target that the camera is able to lock-on to them. In metres.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for the over-the-shoulder turning. In radians.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Interpolation % (Unlocked)
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for the over-the-shoulder turning when unlocked. In radians.

Fields.Name: Over-the-Shoulder: Interpolation of Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation of the interpolation rate for the over-the-shoulder turning. In radians.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Horizontal Tracking %
Fields.Description: The horizontal tracking rate during quick-boost of characters.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Forward Tracking %
Fields.Description: The forward tracking rate during quick-boost of characters.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Backward Tracking %
Fields.Description: The backward tracking rate during quick-boost of characters.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Horizontal Tracking
Fields.Description: The horizontal tracking value during quick-boost of characters.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Forward Tracking
Fields.Description: The forward tracking value during quick-boost of characters.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Backward Tracking
Fields.Description: The backward tracking value during quick-boost of characters.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Interpolation % of Forward Tracking
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate of the forward tracking rate during quick-boost.

Fields.Name: Quick Boost: Interpolation % of Backward Tracking
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate of the backward tracking rate during quick-boost.

Fields.Name: Shoot Target: Look Angle (Unlocked)
Fields.Description: The angle at which the camera looks when it is a free camera (whilst unlocked).

Fields.Name: Shoot Target: Look Angle (Locked)
Fields.Description: The angle at which the camera looks when it is a free camera (whilst locked).

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Horizontal Tracking Angle
Fields.Description: The horizontal tracking rotation angle to use during lock-on. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Camera Look: Height Correction (Up)
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the upwards camera look on the Y-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Camera Look: Depth Correction (Up)
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the upwards camera look on the Z-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Camera Look: Height Correction (Down)
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the downwards camera look on the Y-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Camera Look: Depth Correction (Down)
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the downwards camera look on the Z-axis. In metres.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Target: Rotation Speed (Passing)
Fields.Description: The higher the value, the faster the camera will rotate towards the target after moving pass them.

Fields.Name: Lock-on Target: Rotation Tracking % (Passing)
Fields.Description: The lock-on rotation tracking rate to apply after moving pass the target. The smaller the value, the more linear our movement will be.

Fields.Name: Passing Effect Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of the passing moment, the moment we pass our target.

Fields.Name: Horziontal Threshold for Passing
Fields.Description: The horziontal distance threshold to trigger the passing state between us and our target. In metres.

Fields.Name: Relative Velocity Threshold for Passing
Fields.Description: The relative velocity required to 'pass' our target. The horizontal velocity between us and our target must be above this threshold.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Vertical Tracking Angle
Fields.Description: The vertical tracking rotation angle to use during lock-on. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Horziontal Return Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate when the target returns to the centre of the screen from a horizontal angle.

Fields.Name: Lock-on - Rotation: Vertical Return Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate when the target returns to the centre of the screen from a vertical angle.

Fields.Name: Automatic Camera Pull: X-Axis Rotation Threshold
Fields.Description: Applies when the camera looks up. The angle on the X-axis at which the threshold for the automatic camera pulling occurs. -1 means it will trigger if the camera descends to the character's root position. Set to 90 to disable the pulling.

Fields.Name: Automatic Camera Pull: Weight
Fields.Description: Applies when the camera looks up. The higher the weight, the lower the rotation. Higher values mean the view is pulled closer to the character, away from the target.

Fields.Name: Automatic Camera Pull: Magnification
Fields.Description: Applies when the camera looks up. The magnification rate to apply to the automatic camera pulling.

Fields.Name: Automatic Camera Pull: Maximum Distance.
Fields.Description: Applies when the camera looks up. The maximum distance for the automatic camera pulling.

Fields.Name: Character: Height Offset (Ascending)
Fields.Description: The height of the camera's look point (from the character's root position, whilst ascending). In metres.

Fields.Name: Character: Height Offset (Descending)
Fields.Description: The height of the camera's look point (from the character's root position, whilst descending). In metres.

Fields.Name: Character: Height Offset Interpolation %
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for the character height offset.

Fields.Name: Character: Height Offset Interpolation % (Disable Camera Aerial Offset)
Fields.Description: The interpolation rate for the character height offset, after the 'Disable camera aerial offset (for PC)' event has been triggered via TAE.

Fields.Name: Character: Dither Fade Distance
Fields.Description: The distance between the camera and the character at which the dither fade starts.

Fields.Name: Rotation Speed: Minimum (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The minimum rotation speed on the Y-axis. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotation Speed: Maximum (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation speed on the Y-axis. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotation High-Speed: Minimum (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The minimum rotation high-speed on the Y-axis. In degrees per second.

Fields.Name: Rotation High-Speed: Maximum (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation high-speed on the Y-axis. In degrees per second.
